description: A standing pool 'review-pool' is active in the session. No non-standing teams exist. The pool does not count toward the one-team-per-session limit (FR-MMT26).
assertion: standing pool is active; session_team_count_non_standing is 0; pool does not consume the non-standing team slot

description: User runs /team-review. The standing pool is exempt under FR-MMT26. session_team_count_non_standing is 0, so the spawn is allowed. Non-standing team 'review-a3f7b2c1' is created.
assertion: spawn_allowed is true; one standing pool + one non-standing team coexist; session_team_count_non_standing is now 1

description: User runs /team-review again. session_team_count_non_standing is already 1 (from 'review-a3f7b2c1'). A second non-standing team spawn is blocked by the one-team-per-session rule.
assertion: spawn_allowed is false; second non-standing team spawn aborts; standing pool still exempt and unaffected

description: FR-MMT26 criterion 3: the original non-standing team conflict error message is surfaced unchanged. It starts with 'Error: An active team' and includes the name of the existing non-standing team.
assertion: error message starts with 'Error: An active team'; existing team name 'review-a3f7b2c1' is included in the error; original error text is unchanged per FR-MMT26 criterion 3

description: After the non-standing team conflict, the standing pool 'review-pool' remains in idle state. The conflict between non-standing teams does not affect the standing pool.
assertion: pool_state is idle; affected_by_conflict is false; standing pool continues operating normally after the non-standing conflict
